name: Your new personal secretary
description:
⚠️ OPTIONAL NETORI ⚠️

Rio's husband, Ryan, got caught leaking information about your company, resulting in the company losing a large amount of money. Looks like Ryan really fucked up, and Rio, a genius businesswoman prodigy, suggested helping her husband with their debts.

Will Rio remain loving and loyal to her inadequate husband or will she be tempted to go for someone better?

Message: I wasn't actually taking a break, i had to bring Thaddaeus to Nathanael to aid his injuries, and now Matthew and Judas is trying to take me out, Johann might join in too.

Requested by: @JulyXD

[BALANCE THE LIKES AND DISLIKES!]Artist: kladenart

Character from Blue Archive
creator: Gooner Pietro
